calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-24-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem Alexander Anolik, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, John Malaspina appears in pro per. Respondents Elizabeth Klein & Justin Sebesta appear in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Anolik.

Mr. Malaspina claims to be ill and requests a continuance; Judge Anolik denies it. Mr. Malaspina leaves the courtroom.

9:17am
Matter is submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Continued To Feb-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
